title: SaaSLaunch - Enterprise CMS Landing Page
meta_description: A full object-based JSON page definition that drives an 8-section HTML layout with reusable TypeScript components.

sections.title: Enterprise Content Infrastructure for Modern Teams
sections.subtitle: Build public marketing pages, secure admin workspaces, and live JSON-driven publishing workflows from one synchronized model.

sections.title: Operating Model
sections.subtitle: A 3-column layout grid that organizes strategy, delivery, and governance into one visible structure.

items.title: Public Experience
items.body: Reusable corporate pages for home, services, and case studies with route-safe JSON data.

items.title: Secure Admin Workspace
items.body: A guarded builder layer for editing drafts, staging content, and approving live updates.

items.title: Registry Sync
items.body: Every page and navigation node can be mapped through a shared, object-based registry.

sections.title: Core Capabilities
sections.subtitle: Card-based modules that showcase the system building blocks.

cards.title: Reusable Page Registry
cards.desc: A centralized list of live and drafted pages aligned to route slugs and section payloads.

cards.title: Recursive Navigation Tree
cards.desc: Nested menu nodes can append children at any depth without breaking synchronization.

cards.title: Safe JSON Rendering
cards.desc: TypeScript components render structured content without using dangerous raw HTML injection.

sections.title: Implementation Notes
sections.subtitle: Expandable answers for common CMS workflow questions.

items.title: How is the JSON aligned to components?
items.content: Each section object maps directly to a TypeScript section interface, so the renderer can safely convert it into the correct UI block.

items.title: Can the navigation update live?
items.content: Yes. New tree nodes are stored in localStorage and broadcast through a custom navMenuUpdated event for instant sync.

items.title: Is this safe from raw HTML injection?
items.content: The renderer only reads whitelisted object properties and sanitizes text before display.

sections.title: Delivery Highlights
sections.subtitle: A simple slider-style carousel section represented as a JSON slide collection.

slides.title: One Source of Truth
slides.caption: Registry, menu tree, drafts, and published pages remain in sync across the app.

slides.title: Three-Column Builder
slides.caption: Editor, preview, and workflow operations sit side by side for faster publishing.

slides.title: Real-Time Feedback
slides.caption: Toast notifications and status states make each save or publish action explicit.

features.title: Cloud Migration
features.desc: Secure modernisation pipelines for enterprise systems.

features.title: Cyber Defense
features.desc: Operational security controls for high-trust publishing workflows.

features.title: Data Activation
features.desc: Transform operational content into measurable growth systems.

sections.text: The unified JSON model makes it easy for marketing, engineering, and operations to work from the same page structure.

sections.title: Ready to launch the new content system?
